mapper.select: SELECT t.teaching_id, c.course_code, c.course_name, c.credit, c.hours, te.teacher_name, cr.room_name AS classroomName, t.semester, ts.weekday, ts.section, TIME_FORMAT(ts.start_time, '%H:%i') AS startTime, TIME_FORMAT(ts.end_time, '%H:%i') AS endTime, c.max_students AS maxStudents, c.current_students AS currentStudents, IF(e.enrollment_id IS NOT NULL, TRUE, FALSE) AS isSelected FROM teaching t INNER JOIN course c ON t.course_id = c.id INNER JOIN teacher te ON t.teacher_id = te.teacher_id INNER JOIN classroom cr ON t.room_id = cr.room_id INNER JOIN time_schedule ts ON t.schedule_id = ts.schedule_id LEFT JOIN enrollment e ON t.teaching_id = e.teaching_id AND e.student_id = #{studentId} WHERE t.semester = #{semester} AND c.current_students < c.max_students ORDER BY ts.weekday, ts.start_time

SELECT s.student_id, s.student_name, s.gender, s.major, s.class AS className, DATE_FORMAT(e.enroll_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS enrollTime, e.enrollment_id, e.grade FROM enrollment e INNER JOIN student s ON e.student_id = s.student_id WHERE e.teaching_id = #{teachingId} ORDER BY e.enroll_time
